mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task ( title, description, type, publisher_id, need_people, current_people, reward_points, reward_money, status, deadline ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{type}, #{publisherId}, #{needPeople}, #{currentPeople}, #{rewardPoints}, #{rewardMoney}, #{status}, #{deadline} )
mapper.select: SELECT id AS taskId, title, type, status, current_people AS currentPeople, need_people AS needPeople, reward_points AS rewardPoints FROM task ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, type = #{type}, need_people = #{needPeople}, current_people = #{currentPeople}, reward_points = #{rewardPoints}, reward_money = #{rewardMoney}, status = #{status}, deadline = #{deadline} WHERE id = #{id}
